definitions: A work of art, literature, music, or any other creative endeavor that remains relevant, significant, and highly regarded across generations and eras.
A creation of enduring excellence and universal appeal that transcends the limitations of time and cultural shifts.
examples: The Mona Lisa is considered a timeless masterpiece.
Many critics hailed the film as a timeless masterpiece.
Her latest novel is a timeless masterpiece that will be read for centuries.
